article_title: Northwestern Engineers Build AI-Evolved Modular Robots That Survive Being Chopped in Half and Keep Running

content_preview.title: Northwestern Engineers Build AI-Evolved Modular Robots That Survive Being Chopped in Half and Keep Running
content_preview.summary: Legged metamachines evolved by AI traverse rugged terrain, self-right when flipped, and continue operating after losing limbs, in research published in PNAS.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

A team at Northwestern University has created the first modular robots that can be assembled from interchangeable parts, evolved by artificial intelligence inside a simulation, and then immediately deployed outdoors where they run across rough terrain, recover from severe damage, and keep moving. The study, published March 6 in the [Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences](https://www.eurekalert.org/news-releases/1119131), introduces what the researchers call "legged metamac...
